prompt: Generate Python matplotlib code that reconstructs this chart.
target:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
categories = ['Theta', 'Delta', 'Gamma', 'Iota', 'Zeta', 'Eta']
values = [63.14, 12.86, 18.43, 30.94, 64.18, 60.51]
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
plt.title('Monthly Revenue')
plt.bar(categories, values) if len(values) else None
plt.xlabel('Month')
plt.ylabel('Revenue (M USD)')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
